sleepTargets.label: Nap 1
sleepTargets.notes: Aim for the first nap before the first wake window gets too long.

sleepTargets.label: Nap 2
sleepTargets.notes: This is often the easiest nap to extend.

sleepTargets.label: Nap 3
sleepTargets.notes: Keep this nap steady to protect bedtime.

sleepTargets.label: Nap 4 (if needed)
sleepTargets.notes: Use this only if the earlier naps were too short.

sleepTargets.label: Bedtime
sleepTargets.notes: Drop the catnap once it starts pushing bedtime too late.

feedTargets.label: Morning feed
feedTargets.notes: Start the day with a full milk feed.

feedTargets.label: Midday feed
feedTargets.notes: Offer a full feed before the middle of the day gets busy.

feedTargets.label: Afternoon feed
feedTargets.notes: Keep daytime calories strong so nights do not drift busier.

feedTargets.label: Bedtime feed
feedTargets.notes: A calm bedtime feed still helps anchor the evening.

notes: Here's Somni's customised baseline plan to help {{babyName}} start sleeping better. Somni will adjust it as we learn more and as your baby grows and develops.
